# dns-he-net_arpa_zone (Data Source)

DNS arpa zone

## Example Usage

```terraform
# Retrieve ARPA Zone information.
data "dns-he-net_arpa_zone" "example" {
  zone_id = 123456
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `zone_id` (Number) dns.he.net arpa zone id

### Read-Only

- `name` (String) arpa zone name
